name: genesis
description: AI SDLC Asset Graph Model v3.0.4 — human proxy mode for autonomous overnight runs. --human-proxy flag substitutes F_H actor during --auto: evaluates criteria, logs decisions to proxy-log/, emits review_approved{actor: human-proxy}. Bootloader v3.0.0 adds §XIX workspace write territory (agent directory constraints) and proxy mode axioms. 34/34 features converged, 89/89 REQ keys covered. Universal iterate agent, edge-parameterised graph, event sourcing, projection profiles, two-command UX (Start + Status), spec-boundary reviews, escalation queue, graph zoom, IntentEngine, CONSENSUS functor, multi-tenant design marketplace. 4 agents, 19 commands, configurable YAML topology.
